title: Verify JWT auth refactoring is complete
description: The JWT auth system refactoring appears to already be implemented. Verify: jwt-service.ts provides JWT implementation with signAccessToken/signRefreshToken/verify; _auth.ts provides RBAC with checkRole and ROLE_HIERARCHY; withAuth.ts wraps routes with JWT auth; Users.ts collection has refreshToken, tokenExpiresAt, lastTokenUsedAt, and role fields; jwt-service.test.ts provides comprehensive tests. Only potentially missing is an explicit migration for JWT fields (refreshToken, tokenExpiresAt, lastTokenUsedAt, role) if not auto-generated by Payload.
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts - JwtService class with signAccessToken, signRefreshToken, verify, blacklist
src/auth/_auth.ts - checkRole with ROLE_HIERARCHY for RBAC
src/auth/withAuth.ts - withAuth HOC wrapping route handlers
src/auth/auth-service.ts - AuthService with login, refresh, verifyAccessToken, logout
